name: Sausage Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl until well mixed.
2. Shape the mixture into balls, approximately the size of walnuts.
3. Place the sausage balls on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
4. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for 15 minutes or until cooked through and golden brown.
Makes about 5 dozen.
NOTE:
Defrost and reheat leftovers at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
